title: Jawenko lava beast

{{Quote|Great Jawenko, Mace, where did you get this?|[[Aguilae|Khea Nkuul]]|<ref name="SP">{{JournalCite|11|Spare Parts (short story)}}</ref>}}
The '''Jawenko lava beasts''' were a creature native to [[Mustafar/Legends|Mustafar]]. It naturally produced [[Nkllonian lava extract]] from liquid [[xonolite]].<ref name="UA" />

One such creature stranded on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] gave basis to a [[Jawa/Legends|Jawa]] and [[Tusken Raider/Legends|Sand People]] deity named "[[Great Jawenko]]."<ref name="SP" /> After a [[Mission to rescue Shmi Skywalker Lars/Legends|massacre]] against the [[Rrhr hunting band]] of [[Tusken Raider/Legends|Tusken Raiders]] by the [[Padawan/Legends|Jedi Padawan]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] in retribution of the death of his mother, [[Shmi Skywalker Lars/Legends|Shmi Skywalker Lars]], in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], the Tuskens proceeded to believe that Shmi may have in fact been a [[Witch/Legends|witch]] that was the mate of the Great Jawenko.

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:LavaBeastJawenko.jpg|250px|thumb|right|Luke Skywalker fights a Jawenko lava beast.]]
The Jawenko Beast is the boss of "Level 4: Inside the Sandcrawler" in the [[Wikipedia:Super Nintendo Entertainment System|Super Nintendo]] game ''[[Super Star Wars]]''. On [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], a lava beast was the pet of the diminutive [[Jawa/Legends|Jawas]]. Contained in the furnace on the lower levels of the Jawa [[Sandcrawler/Legends|sandcrawler]], the giant, dragon-like creature would fire searing flames, guarding the captive droid [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] from intruders. For this reason, [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] killed the beast in combat while jumping between precarious platforms over a flow of molten lava.<ref name="SSW" />The Jawenko was also featured in The Void and [[ILM Immersive|ILMxLAB]]'s ''[[Star Wars: Secrets of the Empire]]'' VR experience, taking place on [[Mustafar]]. It is encountered when you are trapped on an outer skiff, following a stormtrooper battle.
